name: Galiano (Italian Liqueur)
directions: Combine sugar and water in a pan and bring to a boil.
Boil for 1 minute and immediately reduce heat.
Simmer for 1 hour or until thickened.
Remove from heat and cool.
Pour sugar syrup into a sterilized bottle.
Add anise extract, vanilla and food colouring.
Stir gently and add the vodka.
Cover and let the mixture sit for 10 days to 2 weeks (the longer the better) before serving.

name: Rice Beverage
directions: Put in blender.
Process until creamy.
Strain.
Discard solids.
Store for two-three days in refrigerator.

similar.name: Non Dairy Sugar Free and Low Carb Hot Chocolate

name: White Hawaiian
directions: Combine Amaretto and Malibu in a shaker with crushed ice; shake well.
Pour into a small glass (mine held about 5 ounces).
Top off the glass with milk or non-dairy milk; stir well.
Enjoy!

name: Loopy Lemonade
directions: Fill tall glass with ice.  Add vodka & triple sec.
Add prepared sweet & sour mix.
Add splash pf cranberry juice.
Garnish with lemon wedge and a twisty straw!

name: Rice Milk
directions: process all in a blender until very smooth.
strain through cheesecloth.
refrigerate & keep up to a week.

name: Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Mix together.
Serve with water.

similar.name: Non Dairy Sugar Free and Low Carb Hot Chocolate
Pierre Herme's Caramel Cinnamon Hot Chocolate (Dairy Free)

name: Almond Milk
directions: Blend until creamy.  This can be stored in the refrigerator for a week.  The nuts and water may separate as they sit but you may shake before using.

name: Animal House Jell-O
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water and vodka.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized dixie cups.

name: Vanilla Egg Cream - Dairy Free
directions: add vanilla flavoring, soy milk and agave nectar to a tall glass.
Stir then add seltzer.
Stir gently.
It gets delightfully frothy.

name: Non Dairy Sugar Free and Low Carb Hot Chocolate
ingredients: fat-free sugar-free instant vanilla pudding mix
directions: Mix it all together.
Use 3-4 TBLS in a mug of hot water.
You can use  2/3 cups of Splenda granular if you don't like Sweet n' Low.
Or you can use 2/3 cups or regualr sugar if you prefer.

similar.name: Pierre Herme's Caramel Cinnamon Hot Chocolate (Dairy Free)

name: Pierre Herme's Caramel Cinnamon Hot Chocolate (Dairy Free)
directions: 1. Heat the milk and water just to a boil in a saucepan. Turn off the heat.

2. In a separate saucepan, heat the sugar with the cinnamon over medium heat. Leave the sugar undisturbed until it begins to caramelize and take on color around the edges. Gently swirl the syrup around the pan at this point until the sugar is completely melted. Continue heating the caramel until dark amber.

3. Watch out for sputtering hot syrup and steam in the following step. Pour the milk over the caramel and cinnamon (the milk might foam up as it boils). Stir until the caramel is completely dissolved.
4. Remove from the heat and whisk in the melted chocolate. Discard the cinnamon stick.
5. Using an immersion or regular blender, whip the hot chocolate for about 1 minute.
6. Serve immediately or store in an airtight container and refrigerate. Caramel cinnamon hot chocolate can be made up to 2 days ahead.

similar.name: Non Dairy Sugar Free and Low Carb Hot Chocolate

name: Ice Cubes
directions: Empty the ice cubes that are left in the trays (if there are any left) into the bin.
Take the trays over to the sink and fill them with cold water. (Hot water will freeze faster and more clear).
Place the water filled ice trays back in the freezer.
Replace the ice bin if you had to remove it.
Shut the door to the freezer.
Be sure to leave for around 4-6 hours at least to make sure it is frozen.
If you want to experiment, you can freeze things like fruit infused waters or juices.

name: Peppermint Ginger Tea -Stomach Soother
directions: Wash and peel ginger root.Slice into thin coins.
Bring a pot of water to boil over high heat,use enough water that once it boils away you'll still have enough tea to fill your favorite mug,say about 2 cups.
Add ginger and let it boil gently for about ten minutes, add mint,turn off heat ,and let steep another 5-10 minutes.
Serve with honey if desired.

similar.name: Pierre Herme's Caramel Cinnamon Hot Chocolate (Dairy Free)

name: Pantry Milk
directions: Combine all grains and seeds. Mixture should yield about one cup.
Cover with water and seal. Store overnight in the refrigerator or at least 4 hours on the countertop.
Drain the soaked grains and seeds of original water. Place them in a large bowl and add 3 cups fresh water.
Using a ladle, scoop some of the mixture with some of the water into the juicer. Repeat until finished.
If you prefer, you can run the milk through again for a thinner mixture.
If using a blender, blend drained mixture with 3 cups fresh water until smooth. Use a strainer over a large bowl to strain out the remaining grains and seeds.
Stir in agave and vanilla.

name: Coconut-Lemon Coffee
directions: Peel 1/2 lemon (big strips so you can easily remove them from the coconut milk with a fork) and put the peel into the coconut milk.
Slowly warm the coconut milk.
While coconut milk is slowly warming, brew one cup of your favourite coffee with 1 inch real vanilla bean in the coffee pot.
While coffee is running through, increase heat and bring coconut milk to a boil. Remove lemon peel with a fork; discard.
Remove vanilla bean from coffee.
Pour into mug and stir in sugar or other sweetener to taste.
If using vanilla extract or vanilla sugar, add it to coffee.
Top with hot coconut milk.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Non Dairy Sugar Free and Low Carb Hot Chocolate
Pierre Herme's Caramel Cinnamon Hot Chocolate (Dairy Free)
